## The problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that's currently hard or impossible with the SDK? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would the SDK look like if it solved this? Code snippet ideal. -->

```typescript
// Example: new method, new option, new behavior
```

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What workarounds did you try? Why don't they work well? -->

## Additional context

<!--
Is this for a specific platform (Instagram, TikTok, etc.)?

---

> 📖 **Looking for an existing feature?** Check the [API docs](https://developers.posteverywhere.ai) and the [README](../../README.md) — it might already exist.
> 🤖 **Building with AI agents?** The companion [MCP server](https://github.com/posteverywhere/mcp) might be a better fit than the raw SDK.
